detectors.description:
AnythingAppTokenPreSale.doPurchase(address) (AnythingAppToken.sol#1145-1205) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- token.balanceOf(msg.sender) == 0 (AnythingAppToken.sol#1147)

Reentrancy in AnythingAppTokenPreSale.doPurchase(address) (AnythingAppToken.sol#1145-1205):
	External calls:
	- token.balanceOf(msg.sender) == 0 (AnythingAppToken.sol#1147)
	- referral = investorWhiteList.getReferralOf(msg.sender) (AnythingAppToken.sol#1153)
	- require(bool)(token.balanceOf(msg.sender).add(tokens) <= LIMIT_PER_USER) (AnythingAppToken.sol#1177)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tokensSold = newTokensSold (AnythingAppToken.sol#1181)
	AnythingAppTokenPreSale.tokensSold (AnythingAppToken.sol#979) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- AnythingAppTokenPreSale.calculateBonus(uint256,address) (AnythingAppToken.sol#1209-1241)
	- AnythingAppTokenPreSale.doPurchase(address) (AnythingAppToken.sol#1145-1205)
	- AnythingAppTokenPreSale.tokensSold (AnythingAppToken.sol#979)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [AnythingAppTokenPreSale.doPurchase(address)](AnythingAppToken.sol#L1145-L1205):
	External calls:
	- [token.balanceOf(msg.sender) == 0](AnythingAppToken.sol#L1147)
	- [referral = investorWhiteList.getReferralOf(msg.sender)](AnythingAppToken.sol#L1153)
	- [require(bool)(token.balanceOf(msg.sender).add(tokens) <= LIMIT_PER_USER)](AnythingAppToken.sol#L1177)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tokensSold = newTokensSold](AnythingAppToken.sol#L1181)
	[AnythingAppTokenPreSale.tokensSold](AnythingAppToken.sol#L979) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [AnythingAppTokenPreSale.calculateBonus(uint256,address)](AnythingAppToken.sol#L1209-L1241)
	- [AnythingAppTokenPreSale.doPurchase(address)](AnythingAppToken.sol#L1145-L1205)
	- [AnythingAppTokenPreSale.tokensSold](AnythingAppToken.sol#L979)
